integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero graphical user interface to add the ISBNs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application window open with the 'Info' tab active for the edited items.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the Zotero SQLite database via terminal or DB browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows running sqlite3 commands or DB Browser applications modifying 'zotero.sqlite'.

integrity.description: The ISBNs are entered into the actual Zotero application fields, not just written in a text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ISBN values appear specifically in the 'ISBN' row of the Zotero right-hand metadata pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified ISBN-13 values (hyphens are optional, e.g., 9780... or 978-0...): 1) Introduction to Algorithms: 978-0262033848. 2) The Art of Computer Programming, Vol 1: 978-0201896831. 3) Design Patterns: 978-0201633610. 4) Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs: 978-0262510875. 5) The C Programming Language: 978-0131103627. 6) Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach: 978-0136042594. Note: If the agent found a different valid ISBN-13 for another edition of the exact same book, it may be acceptable, but the listed ones are the standard verified targets.
